Page.Width: {Binding RelativeSource={RelativeSource Mode=FindAncestor, AncestorType={x:Type ContentControl}}, Path=ActualWidth, FallbackValue=700}
Page.Height: {Binding RelativeSource={RelativeSource Mode=FindAncestor, AncestorType={x:Type ContentControl}}, Path=ActualHeight, FallbackValue=400}

Run.Text: Now that the AEW aircraft is at altitude and we have reduced time compression back to 1x (real time), let's turn on its radar and begin looking for radar contacts.
Use the EMCON control at bottom right to switch on the aircraft's Air and Surface search radars.
You will notice radar contacts will begin to populate around the map as the aircraft locates ships and other aircraft.
